dialogos.texto_en: (We played to our hearts' content and returned\n to the hotel before sunset,\n finishing an early dinner at the restaurant.)
(Everyone was probably tired.\n After the meal,\n we disbanded and returned to our rooms to rest.)
(Well, we played so much.\n It would be weird if we weren't tired.)
Yotsuba was the only one who had energy until the end.
Did you call me?
WOAH?!
Oh, it's Yotsuba?
Whaaa...\nThat's kind of a rude way to greet me.
Oh, sorry. I was surprised when\nyou called me so suddenly.\nYou haven't gone back to your room yet?
Um, it's not that I haven't returned,\nbut I was waiting for you, Uesugi-san.
Me? Do you need something?
Well, you see, at around this time,\nI've heard the view from the lounge \nis supposed to be beautiful.
Oh, really?
So, would it be okay to go see it together?\nJust the two of us...
Oh...
(What am I doing? I should be the one to initiate things!)
(I've only been thinking about enjoying myself\n with her since she talked to me earlier...\n This hasn't been any different from usual.)
Umm, Uesugi-san?
Y-yeah, I'm listening.
...What do you want to do?
Of course, I'm down for anything!
Good.\nI thought you might say no\nsince you hesitated when you answered.
Sorry...\nI...didn't expect you to invite me out, Yotsuba.
Ahaha, I guess so.\nIt's weird for me to say stuff like this, isn't it?
No no, it's not weird at all!
Really, I should be the one to be inviting you here.\nSorry.
N-no, not at all!
Actually, to tell you the truth, Ichika and Nino\ntold me the same thing. They said we should\nspend some time together like a couple.
(Oh, I see. So this was their idea.)
(...This is all going well, isn't it?\n I feel like I'm making everyone uncomfortable.)
Let's go, then.\nI'm excited to see what kind of view we'll\nbe able to see.
Yeah.
Wow...
This is quite different during the day.\nIt feels like a time for adults.
Hey, is it okay for us to be here?\nIt's not like they have an age limit for minors, right?
The hotel guide didn't mention anything like that,\nso I think we're good.
(But honestly, this atmosphere...\n even though we're dating,\n isn't it too high of a hurdle for us?)
Nakano-sama.
Ah, yes?
Please come this way.
(Huh? Why are we being shown to our seats?\n What's going on?)
Well then, Uesugi-san.\nCheers.
Ch-cheers...
(Huh? Do couples really toast like this?\n Ahhhh, oh no, my head is a MESS!\n I don't understand anything anymore!!)
Uesugi-san, are you okay?\nYour eyes have been wandering all over the place.
I can't keep up with all this information processing.\nWhy were we even shown to such good seats\nin the first place?
(You can see the city's night view from the window\n in front of us. It's probably one of the best seats\n in the restaurant, right?)
I'm just guessing, but...\nsince this hotel has a good relationship with our father, \nthey may have been giving us special treatment.
I heard that making a reservation was smooth, too.\nI have to thank him later.
I-is that so.\nHahaha...
(What the hell, a hotel where your\n dad is known by the staff?!\n This is a totally different world!)
But still, I feel a little embarrassed\nabout this kind of thing.\nIt makes me feel like an adult.
Of course,\nthe cocktails are non-alcoholic.
Although we still have to wait until we're adults\nfor a real toast, the atmosphere of this place alone\nis enough to make me feel tipsy.
Oh, I can see that.
(Honestly, I feel uncomfortable in this atmosphere.\n But on the other hand, think about it, Futaro!\n If I can use this to my advantage!)
I-it's been a while since we had this kind of time,\njust the two of us on a date...
We were busy with exams and other things.
That's right. When was the last time we had a chance\nto take it slow like this?\nWasn't it at a family restaurant?
We did go to a family restaurant, didn't we?\nIt's one of the places you hold dear, Uesugi-san.
I remember that day very well.\nFor both you and I, Uesugi-san%p-2;――
It's an important anniversary.
Ahh....\nThinking back on it,\nI did something pretty embarrassing back then.
That's true. It was such a shock for you\nto say something so straightforward like that.
But, I was happy, you know?\nI felt like my dream and the future you were imagining,\nUesugi-san, overlapped perfectly.
Yotsuba...
Th-that's right!\nListen, please, Uesugi-san.
Y-yeah, what's up?
Well, actually%p-2;――
(After that, our conversation shifted to talk about\n the sisters' graduation, and all the while\n I couldn't make any progress, time passed by.)
(Just having a casual conversation with Yotsuba,\n who was laughing innocently,\n was enjoyable in its own way%p-2;――%p;)
(As my tension slowly faded,\n I eventually stopped feeling anxious.)
Lately, it's not just Nino,\nbut even Itsuki is saying stuff, as well.
What is it?\nDid you do something wrong and \nnow you're getting scolded?
It's been almost six months since I've\nstarted dating you, so maybe it's time\nto stop using polite language with you?
%p-2;――%p; is what she said.
Even Itsuki said that...
Oh, and umm...\nAbout that...
Uesugi-san... What do you think?\nShould I keep talking to you this way,\nor should I change anything?
Do whatever you feel comfortable with.\nWhether it's in formal language or not,\nuse whichever is easier for you.
Whichever...is easier, huh.
Doing what's easy and doing what's comfortable\nare similar but different, aren't they?
But to be told that, even by Itsuki.
Well, Itsuki's also been trying to change her way of speaking,\nbut it's not going so well.
Talking to me more casually wouldn't hurt.
Really?
Well, we've been together for almost six months now,\nand even though we've been through a lot\nwe've finally graduated, and moved on...
So, I think it's...okay now, you know?
Yes...
But to be told that, even by Itsuki.
Well, Itsuki's also been trying to change her way of speaking,\nbut it's not going so well.
Well, I mean,\nI'd like you to call me by my first name sometimes,\nyou know?
Huh?
I'm calling you by your first name, aren't I?
We've both graduated high school,\nso we're no longer teacher and student!
From now on, I'd like an equal relationship...\nor something like that...
W-well, since we're lovers,\nI just thought it shouldn't be strange\nto call each other by our first names.
That's true...
Teehee, I see.
But to be told that, even by Itsuki.
Well, Itsuki's also been trying to change her way of speaking,\nbut it's not going so well.
Yeah, I do feel Itsuki's change\nin speech does feel quite strange.
Oh! But don't make fun of her, okay?\nItsuki is doing her best to change.
I know.\nAnd eventually, if she keeps thinking that way,\nit'll change naturally.
Yes, please cheer her on.
(Change naturally, huh.\n I hope my relationship with Yotsuba\n will change naturally too.)
(On the other hand, if I rush and suddenly\n change my attitude, it might make Yotsuba anxious.)
(Spending time together like this\n should deepen our bond...)
